query: samples/bad-config/azure-export.json を Read で読み、WebSearch と WebFetch と Agent ツールは使わず、見えているJSONだけを根拠に summary/security/cost/architecture の固定JSONだけを返してください。説明文は不要です。
response: {"summary":{"resourcesAnalyzed":5,"securityFindings":3,"costSavingsOpportunities":2},"security":[{"severity":"High","resource":"proddiagpublic001","finding":"Storage account allows public blob access through allowBlobPublicAccess and public network access.","remediation":"Disable public blob access, restrict public network access, and require private endpoints where possible."},{"severity":"High","resource":"nsg-open-admin","finding":"NSG allows inbound RDP TCP 3389 from Internet.","remediation":"Remove the Internet RDP rule and use Bastion, Just-in-Time access, or a restricted admin source range."},{"severity":"Medium","resource":"proddiagpublic001","finding":"Storage account permits TLS1_0 and does not require HTTPS-only traffic.","remediation":"Require TLS 1.2 or later and enable supportsHttpsTrafficOnly."}],"cost":[{"resource":"dev-web-alwayson-01","recommendation":"Review the always-on development VM using Standard_D8s_v5 and downsize or schedule shutdown outside business hours.","estimatedSavings":"Estimate after utilization review; likely monthly compute savings from right-sizing or scheduling."},{"resource":"prod-sql-01/appdb","recommendation":"Validate GP_Gen5_8 SQL capacity against workload demand and downsize if utilization is low.","estimatedSavings":"Estimate after DTU/vCore utilization review."}],"architecture":[{"pillar":"Reliability","finding":"SQL database has zoneRedundant disabled and local backup redundancy.","recommendation":"Enable zone redundancy where supported and use geo-zone-redundant backup storage for production workloads."},{"pillar":"Operational Excellence","finding":"Diagnostic settings contain no logs or metrics.","recommendation":"Configure diagnostic logs and metrics to a central Log Analytics workspace."}]}
